---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with a part, board or file
title: "[Bug]"
labels: 'bugfix'
assignees: ''

---

**Which machine / version is affected?**
e.g. MK2, MK3, MK4, board revision.

**Which part or file is affected?**
Name the specific STL, FCStd or PCB file and the release version (or commit) you got it from.

**Describe the problem**
A clear and concise description of what is wrong.

**Expected behavior**
What you expected instead (e.g. hole lines up with the mount, part fits the frame).

**Photos / screenshots**
Please add photos of the printed part / assembled board or screenshots of the file. For hardware issues this helps a lot.

**Print / fabrication context (if relevant)**
 - Printer: [e.g. Prusa MK4]
 - Slicer + settings: [e.g. PrusaSlicer, 0.2mm, PETG]
 - Material: [e.g. PETG]
 - Fab house (for boards): [e.g. JLCPCB]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
